query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.orderStatus, o.customerName, COALESCE(st.stamps, 0) as stamps, COALESCE(st.action, 'none') as action
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN stamp_transactions st ON st.orderId = o.id AND st.action = 'earn'
WHERE o.customerName LIKE '%Rangan%'
ORDER BY o.id DESC;
